title: Align madreperla.yaml to canonical shape
body:
Fix madreperla.yaml to match the canonical shape used across all repos.

## Changes

- Rename `docs:` fields to `usage:` under both `providers.issues` and `providers.docs`
- Remove `designs` key if present
- Add path keys under `providers.docs`: `planning`, `epics`, `ideas`, `headaches`, `retro`

## Target shape

```yaml
description: "Automated semantic versioning via GitHub workflows"
docs: [AGENTS.md, README.md, docs/]
providers:
  issues:
    name: pearls
    config: "prl configure"
    usage: "prl docs"
  docs:
    name: repo
    usage: "cat docs/README.md"
    planning: docs/planning
    epics: docs/planning/epics
    ideas: docs/planning/ideas
    headaches: docs/planning/headaches
    retro: docs/planning
```

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] `docs:` fields renamed to `usage:` under providers.issues and providers.docs
- [ ] `designs` key removed (if present)
- [ ] Path keys added: planning, epics, ideas, headaches, retro
- [ ] `madp configure --provider claude` succeeds after changes

title: Create AGENTS.md and audit root README.md
body:
Two related doc tasks for the repo root.

## AGENTS.md (create)

Create `/workspace/AGENTS.md` with concise agent-facing instructions. Should cover:
- Repo purpose (automated semantic versioning via GitHub workflows)
- Key files and their roles (prl.py, merge-driver.py, workflows)
- Development conventions (type annotations, one commit per task)
- How to run tests and CI checks

Keep it concise — this is for AI agents, not humans. Avoid duplicating what's already in `prl docs`.

## README.md (audit)

Scan the existing 419-line README.md for:
- Stale or inaccurate content (outdated commands, wrong paths, removed features)
- References to things that no longer exist
- Missing information about current functionality

Fix any issues found. Do not rewrite — only correct inaccuracies.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] AGENTS.md exists at repo root with agent-facing instructions
- [ ] AGENTS.md is concise (under 80 lines)
- [ ] README.md audited — all stale/inaccurate content corrected
- [ ] No information duplicated between AGENTS.md and `prl docs` output

title: Create docs/README.md table of contents
body:
Create `docs/README.md` as a table of contents for the docs/ directory.

## Content

Should list and briefly describe the contents of docs/:
- `docs/planning/` — active planning docs
- `docs/planning/epics/` — epic planning docs
- `docs/planning/ideas/` — idea docs (if created)
- `docs/planning/headaches/` — headache/pain-point docs (if created)

Keep it minimal — a heading and a bulleted list. This file is referenced by madreperla.yaml as the docs provider usage output (`cat docs/README.md`).

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] `docs/README.md` exists
- [ ] Lists all subdirectories under docs/ with one-line descriptions
- [ ] Under 30 lines

title: Docs cohesion: README.md, shipped-doc migration, config hygiene
